chapter_title.ar: باب تَرْبِيعِ الْقَبْرِ وَ رَشِّهِ بِالْمَاءِ وَ مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ ذَلِكَ وَ قَدْرِ مَا يُرْفَعُ مِنَ الْأَرْضِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 67 – Sqaring of the grave, and sprinkling it with the water, and what is to be said during that, and the measurement of what it can be raised from the ground

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/112)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/112)
text: كَانَ رَشُّ الْقَبْرِ عَلَى عَهْدِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Talha Bin Zayd,
from Abyu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Sprinkling the grave (with water) was prevalent upon the era of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 7. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Talhah ibn Zayd who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that sprinkling water over a new grave was during the time of the Messenger of Allah.”
